legal.title: Legal & Privacy
legal.reviewSubtitle: Please review our updated terms and privacy practices to continue.
legal.termsDescription: Governs your use of our platform and services.
legal.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service
legal.privacyDescription: Details how we protect and manage your data.
legal.agreePrivacy: I agree to the Privacy Policy
legal.securityNotice: All sensitive health data is secured with 256-bit HIPAA compliant encryption.
legal.termsPreview:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing this application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

2. User Responsibilities

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information.

3. Service Availability

We strive for 99.9% uptime but do not guarantee uninterrupted access.

4. Modifications

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time with prior notice.

5. Account Security

Users must take reasonable steps to protect login credentials and account access.

6. Limitation of Liability

We are not liable for losses resulting from misuse of the platform or interruptions outside our control.
legal.privacyPreview:
1. Data Collection

We collect minimal data necessary to provide our services, including location data for nearby clinic mapping.

2. Data Usage

Your data is used strictly for improving service delivery and personalization.

3. Third-Party Sharing

We never sell your personal data. Data is only shared with authorized medical partners when you request an appointment.

4. Your Rights

You have the right to access, modify, or delete your data at any time.

5. Data Retention

We retain only the information required to provide services and comply with legal obligations.

6. Security Measures

All sensitive medical information is encrypted and protected using industry standard security practices.

settings.deleteWarning: Deleting your account is permanent. All medical records and profile data will be removed.

location.title: Help us find you
location.subtitle: We'll use your location to show the nearest clinics and hospitals with the shortest wait times.
location.privacy: Your location data is private. We never share your history or medical records with third parties without your consent.
location.gpsTip: Device GPS is highly recommended for route searching.
location.permissionRequiredMessage: ClearPath uses your location to show nearby clinics, pharmacies, and routing information.
location.unableToRetrieveMessage: Please ensure GPS is enabled on your device.
location.enabledMessage: Location services have been successfully enabled.
location.errorMessage: Something went wrong while accessing location services.
location.servicesRequiredBody: To submit issue reports or generate a route from your device's location, please enable your device's location services.
